svg.lucide-zap.svg-icon.font-family: "Skolar PE", "Gentium Plus", Alegreya, "Source Sans Pro", "Avenir Next", "Times New Roman"

table.font-family: "Skolar PE", "Gentium Plus", Alegreya, "Source Sans Pro", "Avenir Next", "Times New Roman"

tbody.font-family: "Skolar PE", "Gentium Plus", Alegreya, "Source Sans Pro", "Avenir Next", "Times New Roman"

tbody tr.font-family: "Skolar PE", "Gentium Plus", Alegreya, "Source Sans Pro", "Avenir Next", "Times New Roman"

tbody tr:nth-child(even).font-family: "Skolar PE", "Gentium Plus", Alegreya, "Source Sans Pro", "Avenir Next", "Times New Roman"

tbody tr:nth-child(odd).font-family: "Skolar PE", "Gentium Plus", Alegreya, "Source Sans Pro", "Avenir Next", "Times New Roman"

td.font-family: "Skolar PE", "Gentium Plus", Alegreya, "Source Sans Pro", "Avenir Next", "Times New Roman"

th.background: rgb(21, 30, 45) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

thead.font-family: "Skolar PE", "Gentium Plus", Alegreya, "Source Sans Pro", "Avenir Next", "Times New Roman"

thead th.background: rgb(21, 30, 45) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tr.font-family: "Skolar PE", "Gentium Plus", Alegreya, "Source Sans Pro", "Avenir Next", "Times New Roman"
